holidayMessages.subject: Leave request around Eid al-Adha
holidayMessages.preview: Hi Priya, I'd like to take Jun 18 as a compensatory day after working on the holiday deployment...
holidayMessages.body:
Hi Priya,

I'd like to take June 18, 2026 as a compensatory leave day. I worked on Eid al-Adha (Jun 17) for the production release.

Please approve at your earliest convenience.

Thanks,
Shivam

holidayMessages.subject: Republic Day on-call — comp-off request
holidayMessages.preview: Following the on-call duty on Republic Day, requesting Jan 27 as compensatory off...
holidayMessages.body:
Dear HR,

I was on on-call support duty on Republic Day (Jan 26). As per policy, I'm requesting Jan 27 as a compensatory off.

Clock-in logs are attached in the extra working days module.

Regards,
Shivam Singh

holidayMessages.subject: Extended leave around Diwali
holidayMessages.preview: Planning to take Oct 21–22 as casual leave after the Diwali holiday for family travel...
holidayMessages.body:
Hi Priya,

Diwali is on Oct 20 (Tuesday). I'd like to apply casual leave for Oct 21–22 to travel to my hometown.

Let me know if this conflicts with the sprint schedule.

Thanks,
Shivam

leaveRequests.subject: Doctor appointment — feeling unwell since morning

messages.subject: Medical leave — May 29
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I'm not feeling well since this morning and have a doctor's appointment tomorrow. Requesting medical leave for May 29.

I'll share the medical certificate once available.

Thanks,
Shivam

messages.subject: Re: Medical leave — May 29
messages.body: Approved. Take care and get well soon. Please submit the medical certificate when you return.

leaveRequests.subject: Personal errand — half day afternoon leave

messages.subject: Half day leave — May 25 (PM)
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I have a personal errand in the afternoon on May 25. Requesting half-day casual leave from 1:00 PM.

I'll complete morning standup and urgent tasks before leaving.

Thanks,
Shivam

messages.subject: Re: Half day leave — May 25 (PM)
messages.body: Approved for half day PM. Please update the team on Slack before you leave.

messages.subject: Casual leave — May 24–25
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I need to attend a family function out of town on May 24–25. Requesting 2 days casual leave.

I've handed over my tasks to Rahul for coverage.

Thanks,
Shivam

leaveRequests.subject: Compensatory off after Republic Day on-call

messages.subject: Comp-off for Republic Day duty
messages.body:
Dear HR,

Requesting Jan 27 as compensatory off for on-call duty on Republic Day (Jan 26).

Extra working day log submitted.

Regards,
Shivam

messages.subject: Re: Comp-off for Republic Day duty
messages.body: Approved. Comp-off credited to your earned leave balance.

messages.subject: Casual leave — Jun 30 – Jul 1
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I need to travel for a personal matter on Jun 30 – Jul 1. Requesting 2 days casual leave.

I can join the Jul 1 demo remotely if needed.

Thanks,
Shivam

messages.subject: Comp-off after Eid al-Adha work
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

I worked on Eid al-Adha (Jun 17) for the production release. Requesting Jun 18 as compensatory off.

Deployment completed successfully.

Thanks,
Shivam

messages.subject: Re: Comp-off after Eid al-Adha work
messages.body: On hold — please confirm extra working day log is approved in the system first.

leaveRequests.subject: Post-Diwali travel — rejected due to release

messages.subject: Leave after Diwali — Oct 21–22
messages.body:
Hi Priya,

Planning casual leave Oct 21–22 after Diwali for family travel.

Please advise.

Thanks,
Shivam

messages.subject: Re: Leave after Diwali — Oct 21–22
messages.body: Rejected due to Q4 release freeze. Please reschedule after Nov 15 or discuss alternate dates.
